meaning: adv.&adj.[音](诸如在拨奏之后恢复)以弓拉(的)
examples: There are many rocks near Arco.
This is the old castle of Arco .
Directly across was the Arco building.
Among the corporations that moved headquarters to the suburbs or into New Jersey: Provident Mutual and Arco Chemical.
In Sacramento, the professional basketball team plays in the Arco Arena, named after a company that no longer exists.
